summary: All 17 sprint-planning tests pass; test coverage is solid across layout, component, and query layers with no critical issues

findings.description: Scope creep: diff includes unrelated changes to command-center, meeting-summaries, sentiment, and uptime components (color token changes, text wrapping) that are not part of sprint-planning tests
Mood-badge and uptime bar colors switched from theme tokens (bg-green, bg-red) to Tailwind defaults (bg-green-500, bg-red-500), creating inconsistency with other components still using theme tokens
TabsContent mock always renders children regardless of active tab, so tab switching behavior is not truly tested
queries.test.ts mock chain is order-dependent on Promise.all call order — reordering queries would silently break tests
